projects.title: ServiceNow_ITSM_Project1
projects.domain: ITSM market shifts to AI triage, predictive routing; competition: ServiceNow, BMC, Ivanti, Jira SM.
projects.tech: Zurich · Incident + Predictive Intelligence + Flow Designer · UI Policies · Client Scripts · KB links.
projects.problem: Manual, inconsistent triage increases MTTR and cost.
projects.hypothesis: Automated categorization & routing will reduce MTTR 30–40% and improve CSAT.
projects.prototype: Flow triggers on Incident create → Decision → Assign group → Notify → Update state; validated on sample tickets.

projects.title: ServiceNow_ITSM_Project2
projects.domain: Demand for self-service + GenAI virtual agents; emphasis on deflection and accurate knowledge.
projects.tech: Virtual Agent + Catalog + KB + Flow Designer; intent models; RBAC; analytics dashboards.
projects.problem: High call volume and backlog due to repetitive requests.
projects.hypothesis: VA + deflection will cut live-agent contacts by 25–40%.
projects.prototype: VA topics route to catalog items; auto-fulfillment flows; CSAT survey captured in VA end states.

projects.title: ServiceNow_ITSM_Project3
projects.domain: SRE/DevOps alignment with change risk scoring; need safer, faster releases.
projects.tech: Change Management · Risk calc policies · CI/CD webhooks · Approvals · CAB workbench.
projects.problem: Change failures causing incidents and downtime.
projects.hypothesis: Risk-based approvals reduce change-induced incidents by 20%.
projects.prototype: Auto risk score from CI impact/priority; dynamic approvals; post-implementation review workflow.

projects.title: ServiceNow_ITSM_Project4
projects.domain: Problem management + root-cause knowledge to curb repeat incidents.
projects.tech: Problem Mgmt · Known Error DB · CMDB relationships · Task SLAs · Comms plans.
projects.problem: Recurring incidents due to lack of root-cause tracking.
projects.hypothesis: Structured problem process reduces repeat incidents 15–25%.
projects.prototype: Problem from major incident; RCAs linked to CIs; KE articles published; measure recurrences.

projects.title: ServiceNow_HRSD_Project1
projects.domain: HR case automation; sensitive data handling; guided decisions.
projects.tech: HR Case Mgmt · Lifecycle Events · Decision table + Flow Designer · Encryption/RBAC.
projects.problem: Slow HR routing and policy inconsistency.
projects.hypothesis: Decision tables assign to the right HR team, cutting resolution by 30%.
projects.prototype: On case create → Decision: category → Update assignment → Notify; audit trail enabled.

projects.title: ServiceNow_HRSD_Project2
projects.tech: Employee Center · HR Catalog · KB search; accessibility and localization.
projects.problem: Employees confused by scattered HR resources.
projects.hypothesis: Curated EC + KB reduces HR case intake 20–30%.
projects.prototype: EC cards → HR catalog flows; CSAT widget; search telemetry dashboard.

projects.title: ServiceNow_HRSD_Project3
projects.domain: Compliance-heavy HR processes need transparency and auditability.
projects.tech: Document Mgmt · e-Sign · Records retention · Data masking.
projects.hypothesis: Standardized artifacts + retention reduce audit findings.
projects.prototype: Templates with approval flows; retention schedules; exportable evidence set.

projects.title: ServiceNow_HRSD_Project4
projects.domain: Analytics to improve HR services and workforce satisfaction.
projects.tech: PA (Performance Analytics) · HR KPIs · Segmentation by location/role.
projects.problem: No visibility into HR SLAs and bottlenecks.
projects.hypothesis: Actionable KPIs improve SLA attainment by 10–15%.
projects.prototype: Scorecards and breakdowns; trend widgets; improvement initiatives tracked.

projects.title: ServiceNow_ITOM_Project1
projects.domain: Need unified visibility of infra & apps; CMDB is foundational.
projects.tech: CMDB · Discovery · Service Mapping · Health KPIs.
projects.problem: Fragmented asset data and blind spots.
projects.hypothesis: Accurate CMDB improves incident correlation and ownership.
projects.prototype: Discovery schedules; patterns tuned; CI relationships visualized; health dashboard.

projects.title: ServiceNow_ITOM_Project2
projects.domain: Event Mgmt consolidation; noise reduction; actionable alerts.
projects.tech: Event Mgmt · Alert Correlation · Thresholds · Integrations.
projects.prototype: Ingestion → dedup rules → assignment → incident creation via policies.

projects.title: ServiceNow_ITOM_Project4
projects.domain: Cloud resource sprawl; need cost and performance insights.
projects.tech: Cloud Discovery · Tagging · Cost reports· Automation policies.
projects.hypothesis: Tagging + cleanup policies reduce idle spend 10–20%.
projects.prototype: Inventory by tag; idle detectors; auto-stop nonprod out-of-hours.

projects.title: ServiceNow_ITOM_Project5
projects.domain: AIOps to detect anomalies and prevent incidents.
projects.tech: Health Log Analytics · Anomaly detection · Runbook automation.
projects.hypothesis: AIOps enables proactive fixes; fewer P1 incidents.
projects.prototype: Log patterns → anomalies → trigger runbooks → verify metrics dip.

projects.title: ServiceNow_CSM_Project1
projects.domain: Customer service deflection via portals and AI search.
projects.tech: CSM Cases · Portal · KB · Search tuning · SLAs.
projects.prototype: Portal wizard → case creation only when needed; CSAT tracking.

projects.title: ServiceNow_CSM_Project2
projects.tech: Advanced Work Assignment · Channels · Agent workspace.
projects.problem: Mismatched skills to cases; idle time.
projects.hypothesis: Skill-based routing boosts FCR and lowers handle time.
projects.prototype: Awa queue + skills; assignment rules; live metrics.

projects.title: ServiceNow_CSM_Project3
projects.problem: SLA breaches due to wrong entitlements.
projects.hypothesis: Automated entitlements raise compliance and CSAT.
projects.prototype: Contract lookup on account; SLA attach; breach alerts.

projects.title: ServiceNow_CSM_Project4
projects.domain: Proactive support via telemetry and outreach.
projects.tech: Events → CSM cases; campaigns; knowledge suggestions.
projects.problem: Issues discovered only after customer complaints.
projects.prototype: Event triggers → bulk comms → cases pre-filled with diagnostics.

projects.title: ServiceNow_GRC_Project1
projects.domain: Integrated risk management as AI adoption grows.
projects.problem: Siloed risk tracking and unclear ownership.
projects.hypothesis: Unified GRC lowers risk exposure and audit findings.
projects.prototype: Risk register with KRIs; control tests; issue remediation workflow.

projects.title: ServiceNow_GRC_Project2
projects.domain: Regulatory alignment incl. data privacy and AI governance.
projects.hypothesis: Evidence automation shortens audits and increases accuracy.
projects.prototype: Periodic attestations; evidence library; exportable audit pack.

projects.title: ServiceNow_GRC_Project3
projects.domain: Third-party/vendor risk intensifies in complex supply chains.
projects.problem: Opaque vendor risks impacting delivery and security.
projects.hypothesis: Structured TPRM reduces incidents from vendor failures.
projects.prototype: Tiering vendors; auto questionnaires; remediation tracking.
